privileged_info_summary: The DSST data is synthetically generated via a Python script in setup_task.sh. The script simulates exactly 30 participants, including one chance-level artifact responder ('sub-err-44') who falls below the 0.20 Accuracy Rate threshold and is excluded, and three slow responders ('sub-115', 'sub-108', 'sub-122') who fail to reach 30 correct trials in the 90-second window, forcing their ILI to be null. The task relies strictly on this generated dataset at the specified data_path and verifies output at the specified output_path.
